logs.heading: A0: Loading gmail skill to fetch and cache Gmail threads

After loading, I should wait for completion without interrupting.
Once complete, I'll use notify-user to send a success message.
If it fails, I'll use notify-user with priority 4 and error details.

tool_args.text:
**✅ Gmail Sync Completed Successfully**

The skill connected to Chrome DevTools at `http://192.168.1.11:9223`, scanned the last 3 days of emails, and generated AI summaries for relevant threads.
